headline: Reach Camp Dream GA for family questions, volunteer interest, and supporter conversations
subheadline: Use this page when you need help choosing the right program, want to ask a practical camp question, or want to connect about volunteering, giving, or partnership support.

sections.title: Families and caregivers
sections.description: Ask about camper fit, preparation, timing, medical considerations, registration, and what to expect during the camp experience.

sections.title: Volunteers
sections.description: Reach out about counselor roles, junior counselor participation, medical volunteering, dates, and service expectations.

sections.title: Donors and partners
sections.description: Use this route for giving questions, sponsorship conversations, church partnerships, and community support ideas.

leadForm.heading: Send a message to the camp team
leadForm.intro: Share the reason you are reaching out and enough context for the team to guide you well.

faq.question: Can I use this page for volunteer questions?
faq.answer: Yes. This page works for counselors, junior counselors, medical volunteers, and supporters who need direction.

cta.heading: Browse the FAQ, location, and calendar pages if you want the essentials before reaching out.
cta.body: The site now keeps the practical planning pages easy to find so families and supporters can move at their own pace.
